prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: 4SN-BLACKHEADREMOV-3PC-71219 Product Type: SKIN_BLEMISH_REMOVAL_TOOL Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: ToolTreaux Blackhead Remover Tool Facial Cleanser Pore Cleaner Travel Case - 3pc Description: Are you sick of pesky blackheads and acne? The ToolTreaux pore cleaner tool kit comes with 2 basic extractor tools designed to safely and easily remove blackheads and pimples. Each kit comes with a piercing needle and loop for safely puncturing and removing pimples as well as a tool designed for blemish and blackhead squeezing.

Although they may look intimidating, our blackhead removal tools are easy to use. Before you begin, make sure to clean your face with warm water to open pores and dry thoroughly. Sterilize your tools with hot soapy water or a preferred disinfectant before every use to ensure there is no bacteria or dirt. Proceed to pierce mature pimples and then choose the appropriate-sized loop to squeeze the acne out. Make sure to disinfect and dry your tools immediately after each use.

Our pack of 2 dual-tipped blackhead removal tools is suitable for both beginners and professionals alike. Made of high-quality, durable stainless steel, these tools are corrosion-resistant and won't rust so you can count on them to last through many uses.

The pimple extractor kit comes with a lightweight, compact plastic carry case with a snap-tight lid to keep the tools organized and secured when not in use. The whole set weighs less than .08lbs, making it great for travel. Bring the tool kit with you to work, school, or on trips for on-the-go use if needed. Keeping your facial pores clean and free of blackheads is a great way to look and feel younger, so make sure to grab this tool set - your face will thank you. Search Terms: blackhead remover blackhead remover tools blackhead strips remover mask blackhead extractor pore cleaner pore cleaner tool nose pore cleaner facial skin care products facial cleanser facial cleansing brush facial mask facial brush facial wand makeup Features: - DUAL-TIPPED EXTRACTOR TOOLS - ToolTreaux pore cleaner tool kit comes with 2 basic tools designed to remove blackheads easily; 1 tool includes a piercing needle and loop for safely puncturing and removing pimples & 1 tool is designed for blemish and blackhead squeezing - EASY TO USE - Before use, make sure to clean your face with warm water and dry thoroughly. Sterilize your tools, and pierce mature pimples; choose the appropriate loop to squeeze the acne out and then disinfect and dry your tools immediately after use - PROFESSIONAL DESIGN - Pack of 2 dual-tipped blackhead tools is suitable for beginners and professionals alike. Made of durable, high-quality stainless steel that is corrosion-resistant and won't rust so you can count on them to last - COMPACT CARRY CASE INCLUDED - Pimple removal tools come with lightweight, compact plastic carry case with snap-lid to keep tools secured and organized when not in use. Great for travel, bring the set with you to school, work, or on trips for on-the-go use if needed - SPECIFICATIONS - Materials: stainless steel, plastic; Number of pieces: 3; Dual-tipped tools (4 tips total); Colors: chrome, clear; Weight: .08 pounds (1.28 ounces) === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ToolTreaux 3pc Blackhead Remover Tool with Travel Case
